title: drynaria rivalis
intro: Drynaria rivalis, also known as the Polypodium leucotomos or Dragon's Blood Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Drynaria rivalis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as being used to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and herpes simplex. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried leaves, capsules, or extracts, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
